name: 9dc67198-4e5b-4ee4-888b-eb33b6c7fe3f

agentUtterance.text: What can I help you with today?

userUtterance.text: I finally finished that massive web development project for Pine Creek!

functionParameter.note_text: Finished the Pine Creek web development project.

functionParameter.status: Success: Growth note added to Evidence List.

agentUtterance.text: That is a significant project to cross the finish line. I've safely logged this win to your Evidence List so we have a record of your momentum. What would you like to focus on next?

playbookInput.precedingConversationSummary: The user has written a spontaneous win.

playbookOutput.executionSummary: Agent congratulates the customer on finishing a web development project and logs it to the customer's Evidence List.

description: Teach the router to use the log_growth_note tool when the user shares a victory, rather than forcing them into a flow.
